content.en:
Black Wind Mountain has ten kings and hundred generals and many peak masters, and the peak masters must be served by true ancestors.

The hundred generals are all top true ancestors, and they can fight with ordinary Dao ancestors, and the peak master seems to be just an ordinary true ancestor, but the true ancestor who can really rank in the position of the peak master must not be an ordinary true ancestor, and his cultivation has reached at least the middle stage of the avenue, and his combat power is definitely not weaker than the ordinary true ancestor of the late stage of the avenue, and the best of them may also be able to compete with the top true ancestor.

Previously, although Ye Tian had entered the Little Wind King Palace, because it was not the real residence of the Wind King, and the Wind King did not fall there, the Little Wind King Hall did not have the Wind King Order.

Therefore, getting this Black Wind Mountain Peak Master Order was also a good surprise for Ye Tian.

This Black Wind Mountain Peak Master Token is a complete token, not a mutilated token like the previous Minor Boss Token.

Ye Tian took a moment to refine this Black Wind Mountain Peak Master Order.

This Black Wind Mountain Peak Master Decree contained some information, allowing Ye Tian to know the origin of the previous master.

"Black Wind Mountain, True Ancestor of Hundred Tribulations!"

This is the identity of the previous owner of this Black Wind Mountain Peak Master Order.

From the information, it was known that the True Ancestor of the Hundred Tribulations was in the middle realm of the Great Dao, and was one of the many True Ancestors of the Black Wind Mountain.

What surprised Ye Tian even more was that this Black Wind Mountain Peak Master Decree was not just a simple token, but also one of the inheritance keys.

According to the regulations of Black Wind Mountain, once the peak master falls outside, as long as he is not the person who killed the peak master, and only accidentally obtained the peak master order, he can go to the inheritance place of the Black Wind Mountain with the peak master order.

Once you pass the assessment of the Land of Inheritance, you can become one of the peak masters of Black Wind Mountain and enjoy the many benefits and protection of Black Wind Mountain.

"I wonder if there is a place of inheritance of Black Wind Mountain on this battlefield ruins?"

Ye Tian muttered.

There are many inheritance places in Black Wind Mountain, because the domain boundary is very large, and the power of Black Wind Mountain is all over the domain boundary, so in order to facilitate the development of Black Wind Mountain in the domain boundary, many inheritance places have been established.

But after all, this battlefield relic is only one of the countless fragments of the domain realm, and it does not necessarily have the inheritance of Black Wind Mountain.

"Try it!"

Ye Tian urged the Black Wind Mountain Peak Lord's Order, strictly speaking, he urged a formation above, trying to communicate the inheritance place of Black Wind Mountain.

If you can sense the place of inheritance, the peak master order will guide the way.

Little by little, about a few minutes passed.

At this time, the Peak Master Order finally got in touch with the distant inheritance land.

Seeing that the Peak Lord Commander sensed the place of inheritance, Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

This is not a domain realm in the true sense, it is just one of the fragments, so Ye Tian is also afraid that the peak master order will be invalid here, but now it has finally taken effect, so Ye Tian does not have to worry so much.

If you can't sense the inheritance land, then the value of this peak master order will be greatly reduced.

"I don't know if I can inherit the Peak Lord Order and become the real Black Wind Mountain Peak Lord!"

Ye Tian muttered.

According to the rules of Black Wind Mountain, if you want to become a peak master, you need at least a mid-avenue cultivation, and he is just a true monarch.

However, nothing is absolute.

If you want to become the peak master of Black Wind Mountain, the most important thing is to pass the inheritance assessment, as long as you can pass the assessment, then you are a peak master, and cultivation is secondary.

It's just that without the cultivation of the middle stage of the Great Dao, it is almost difficult to pass the assessment.

"The True Ancestor in the middle of the Great Dao is not weak, and the standard of the Domain Realm is even higher, and the True Ancestor of the Domain Realm is probably surpassing our True Ancestor here in terms of combat effectiveness. In addition, the true ancestor who was able to become the peak master of the Black Wind Mountain was definitely a true genius. With my current strength, I'm afraid I may not be able to beat the Black Wind Mountain's Dao Early Stage True Ancestor, let alone compare with the Peak Lord!"

Ye Tian was very self-aware, and he wouldn't really think that he could skip the level and fight with the peak master of Black Wind Mountain, it was almost a fool's dream.

Becoming the peak master, Ye Tian has no hope.

But Ye Tian still has a choice, that is, to become a reserve peak master!

This is the treatment that Black Wind Mountain implements for true geniuses, after all, some real geniuses are just hindered by cultivation and cannot pass the peak master assessment, but in fact, their combat power and talent potential far surpass that of the big bosses.

In this way, it is a good choice to prepare the peak master.

In addition to not having a peak lord territory, the legions under his command and the peak lord inheritance, the reserve peak master has all the other treatments.

The Peak Lord's Territory is not attractive to Ye Tian, and now the domain realm is broken, where is there any territory!

As for the legion under his command, this is also a shadowless thing, after all, Black Wind Mountain is estimated to have been destroyed, even if he becomes the peak master, he will not have his own legion, unless he develops slowly, then there is no difference between the reserve peak master and the peak master at this point.

It's a real pity that the peak master inheritance, this is definitely an amazing inheritance.

"Then try your best to become a reserve peak master, with my strength and potential, it shouldn't be difficult to become a reserve peak master of Black Wind Mountain!"

Ye Tian said confidently.

Thinking like this, Ye Tian changed his plan and prepared to go to the Land of Black Wind Mountain Inheritance.

......

Outside the boundary.

A large number of Dao Ancestors descended here, and their eyes were always staring at the battlefield ruins in the Quasi-Dao Realm.

It's just that the battlefield ruins are full of the power of the Dao Ancestors, and even a trace of the power above the Dao Ancestors, so that many Dao Ancestors have no way to detect the situation of the battlefield ruins.

However, the Dao Ancestors still have their own news channels, and each Dao Ancestor-level force has a special True Monarch as an intelligence officer to convey the situation of the battlefield relics again and again.

Therefore, the Dao ancestors still have a certain understanding of the battlefield relics.

At this time, the Dao Ancestors were discussing the matter of the battlefield relics.

"Everyone, there are a large number of treasures in the battlefield ruins, some people have found the corpse of the True Ancestor and the treasures of the True Ancestor, some people have obtained the inheritance of the True Ancestor, and some people have even seen the Dao Ancestor's dojo, but they can't break the dojo ban. "

"Yes, the value of this battlefield relic is too great, it is estimated that there are many inheritances of Dao Ancestors, although there may not be inheritances above Dao Ancestors, but the Dao Ancestors of the domain realm are very powerful, and the inheritances are extremely powerful, which is of great benefit to us. "

"And when are we going to go?"

"Wait a minute, we don't know much about the situation of the battlefield ruins now, besides, we haven't been able to stay for long when we enter the quasi-path realm, if we end up now, we have to look for opportunities, maybe we don't even find the chances, we have to be forced to leave the battlefield ruins!"

"Yes, we still have to wait, as long as we confirm the real place of chance, we will come directly through the positioning!"

"Let's say it in advance, once we enter the quasi-Dao realm, the agreement between us not to fight and fight will be invalidated, if anyone's incarnation is destroyed, don't come out and complain!"

"The incarnation enters the quasi-Dao realm, and it itself has to bear the backlash of the quasi-Dao realm, and we also need to pay some price, and condensing such an incarnation is also a big burden for us, if we really want to incarnate and die, the loss is not small, if you can not fight, it is best not to fight!"

Don't fight?

This Dao Ancestor's words are undoubtedly ridiculous, and no Dao Ancestor will be serious.

Once there is an amazing opportunity, these Dao Ancestors will not care who you are, even if the real body comes, I am afraid that they will fight.

As time passed, more and more True Monarchs in the battlefield ruins gained great opportunities.

At all times, there are relics of the True Monarch leaving the battlefield, and there are new True Monarchs entering the battlefield.

Even some Heavenly Monarchs have taken huge risks in vain to enter the battlefield ruins in search of opportunities, but the probability of such a Heavenly Monarch falling has reached more than nine out of nine.

Not long after, Ye Tian finally arrived at the inheritance land of Black Wind Mountain!
